source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for luminous product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, crisp display hierarchy, compact dashboard numerics, and readable multilingual controls.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, black wing-vein dividers, blue active rails, emerald focus states, glint-white panels, dense media dashboard sections, and restrained morpho-scale texture.

prompts.label: Transparent Morpho Butterfly motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Morpho Butterfly transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated morpho butterfly full-body motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A morpho butterfly with accurate anatomy, broad open wings, luminous iridescent electric blue wing fields, black wing margins and veins, subtle emerald-green shadow shifts in the scales, dark body, antennae, and crisp natural wing-scale texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show both wings, body, antennae, black margins, and wing edges without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves iridescent blue, black vein structure, emerald shadow shifts, and fine wing texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no monarch, no moth, no dragonfly, no flower, no leaf as the main subject, no tropical forest background, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second insect.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Morpho Butterfly" with subtitle "Morpho Butterfly Design System - Light Mode". It must be a luminous media system derived from a blue morpho butterfly, not a glasswing or monarch.
Motif reference: broad open morpho butterfly wings with saturated iridescent electric blue, cyan glow, black-brown margins and vein lines, subtle emerald-green scale shadows, white wing glints, and deep tropical forest shadow.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, clear section cards, no dense tiny token tables.
Required visible section headings, all present: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Tokens section: include clearly labeled shadcn/tweakcn semantic token chips for bg, fg, card, primary, primary-fg, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart-1, chart-2, chart-3, sidebar, destructive.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, search field, sidebar, top nav, metric cards, charts, loading, empty, error, success.
Typography: English and Japanese examples for product UI; use short labels only.
Style details: precise 8px grid, 8px radius on cards and controls, thin black wing-vein dividers, electric blue primary actions, emerald focus rings, pale glint surfaces, subtle morpho scale texture samples, tropical forest depth as quiet dark neutrals.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: electric morpho blue, cyan wing glow, black-brown wing margin, emerald scale shadow, pale glint white, mist paper, deep forest shadow, muted slate gray. Avoid amber, orange, red except small destructive error, purple gradients, rainbow palettes, generic stock UI, glasswing transparency, random brands, watermark, and misspellings.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board titled exactly "Morphous Morpho Butterfly" with subtitle "Dark Mode". It must feel like the same system translated from the light board: luminous media system, blue morpho butterfly motif, precise shadcn/tweakcn UI, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve the light-board layout language and motif-derived roles from the blue morpho butterfly: electric blue primary, cyan glow, black-brown wing margins and vein lines, emerald scale shadow, pale wing glints, mist neutrals, and deep tropical forest shadow.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, clear section cards, no dense tiny token tables.
Required visible section headings, all present: Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Tokens section: include clearly labeled shadcn/tweakcn semantic token chips for bg, fg, card, primary, primary-fg, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart-1, chart-2, chart-3, sidebar, destructive.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, search field, sidebar, top nav, metric cards, charts, loading, empty, error, success.
Typography: English and Japanese examples for product UI; use short labels only.
Visual details: dark background from deep forest and black wing margin, elevated cards in forest ink, light text from pale wing glints, electric blue active states, emerald focus rings, cyan chart lines, subtle black wing-vein dividers, morpho scale texture samples, exact 8px radius on cards and controls.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: deep forest black, wing margin black-brown, electric morpho blue, cyan wing glow, emerald scale shadow, pale glint white, muted slate gray. Avoid amber, orange, purple gradients, rainbow palettes, generic blue-only theme, glasswing transparency, random brands, watermark, and misspellings.
